query: SELECT userId, itemType, name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM wardrobeItems GROUP BY userId, itemType, name HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RfxnZb4sKQE9yA3.root --database SGdPHKr3xPrRPbHA9C9esB --execute SELECT userId, itemType, name, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM wardrobeItems GROUP BY userId, itemType, name HAVING cnt > 1 LIMIT 20;
